description: This winter, slip into your timberland Mount Holly Waterproof Fleece-Lined boots and hit the roads in style. With comfort and style alongside you in these boots, your winter is all set to be fun-filled.UpperWaterproof leather upper in a natural tan shade for absolute durability and comfort Soft woolen collar and inner lining for insulation and all-day comfortCushioned footbed with a wollen lining for all-day, warm and snug comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for all-day comfort and durabilityOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with horizontal lugs for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for enhanced inner-arch supportBoot careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
